mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_content (content_type, title, summary, body, video_url, cover_url, category, view_count, published, submit_status, creator_id) VALUES (#{contentType}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{body}, #{videoUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{viewCount}, #{published}, #{submitStatus}, #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_content SET content_type = #{contentType}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body = #{body}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, category = #{category}, published = #{published}, submit_status = #{submitStatus}, submit_audit_remark = #{submitAuditRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM edu_content
AND published = 1 AND submit_status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND content_type = #{contentType}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR body LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM edu_content WHERE submit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT content_type AS contentType, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) AS totalViews FROM edu_content WHERE published = 1 GROUP BY content_type
